roles.name: Brahmarishi (Architect of Realms)
roles.description: A seer of the highest order — designs the over-arching solution as Vishvakarma shaped the worlds.

roles.name: Senapati (Commander of the Host)
roles.description: Leads the campaign as Kartikeya led the devas — sets the cadence, holds the line, reports to the council.

roles.name: Pandit of the Sacred Records
roles.description: Keeper of the manuscripts — guardian of fields, layouts, profiles and permission sets.

roles.name: Vishvakarma's Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC and platform craft at the celestial anvil.

roles.name: Acharya of the Western Gurukul
roles.description: Master-teacher across the western seas — sets the standards and guides the senior shishyas.

roles.name: Senior Rishi of the Eastern Ashram
roles.description: Practiced sage of customer requirements — patrols the borders of scope with calm wisdom.

roles.name: Shishya of the Eastern Ashram
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior rishi's eye.

roles.name: Setubandha Architect (Bridge of the West)
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — as Nala built the bridge to Lanka.

roles.name: Senior Setu Builder (Eastern Workshop)
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware and event flows under the Setubandha Architect's plan.

roles.name: Setu Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of resilient handling.

roles.name: Vaidya of the Houses of Healing
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds the maladies before they reach the rajya.

roles.name: Royal Herald (Marketing Acharya)
roles.description: Sounds the conch and lifts the banner for the brand — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Bard of the Court
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert.

roles.name: Court Bard
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward — content, creative and the daily yatra.

roles.name: Sutradhara (Council Scribe)
roles.description: Holder of the thread — translates between mortal customer and the celestial craft of design.

roles.name: Master Smith of Devalok
roles.description: Most senior of forgers across the western seas — entrusted with the heaviest celestial weapons.

roles.name: Brahmachari Apprentice
roles.description: First-stage shishya — learns the asanas of Salesforce craft under careful supervision.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set. Names treated with respect — Hindu mythology is sacred to a billion-plus living people.

workstreams.name: Testing on the Field of Dharma

realms.projectName: Devas vs Asuras — Surveillance & Defence Build

workstreams.name: Testing at the Ramparts of Svarga

trimurti-and-tridevi.themedRole: Vaidya of the Houses of Healing

vishnus-avatars.themedRole: Senior Rishi of the Eastern Ashram

Senior Rishi of the Eastern Ashram

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Council Convened
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Discovery sign-off — the Trimurti and Tridevi take their seats.

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Churning of the Ocean
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Build kickoff: the Samudra Manthan begins, devas and asuras pulling in concert.

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Audience at Brahmaloka
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with Brahma's council.

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Amrita Distribution
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Phase invoice trigger: the nectar is poured and accounted for.

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Cosmic Dance Go-Live
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Go-Live: Shiva's Tandava marks the new cycle.

trimurti-and-tridevi.name: Tridevi Hand-off
trimurti-and-tridevi.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Saraswati, Lakshmi and Parvati.

vishnus-avatars.name: Matsya Saves the Vedas
vishnus-avatars.description: Project kickoff: the sacred scriptures rescued from the deluge.

vishnus-avatars.name: Kurma Bears the Mountain
vishnus-avatars.description: Build phase: foundation laid as the tortoise supports Mandara.

vishnus-avatars.name: Setubandha Bridge Complete
vishnus-avatars.description: UAT gate: the bridge to Lanka holds under load.

vishnus-avatars.name: Bhagavad Gita Discourse
vishnus-avatars.description: Go-Live: Krishna delivers the Gita on the field — production cutover.

vishnus-avatars.name: Return to Vaikuntha
vishnus-avatars.description: Hyper-care close: the avatar rests in the celestial abode.

vishnus-avatars.name: Kalki's Final Settlement
vishnus-avatars.description: Final invoice: the closing of the Kali Yuga ledger.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Sabha at Indraprastha
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Discovery gate: the Pandavas convene in their hall of mirrors.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Krishna's Peace Embassy
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Build: diplomatic outreach before war — every option exhausted.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Vyuha Formations Approved
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Solution review: Drona's chakravyuha and Arjuna's counter approved.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Victory at Kurukshetra
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Go-Live: the eighteenth day, dharma prevails.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Yudhishthira Crowned
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Hyper-care close: rajya restored, court reseated at Hastinapura.

mahabharata-pandavas.name: Final Tribute Paid
mahabharata-pandavas.description: Final invoice: Ashwamedha yajna closes the campaign accounts.

lesser-deities-and-asuras.name: Forge the Vajra Grid
lesser-deities-and-asuras.description: Build: the thunderbolt network deployed across the loka.

lesser-deities-and-asuras.name: Durga Defeats Mahishasura
lesser-deities-and-asuras.description: Solution review: the great pen-test — buffalo demon repelled.

lesser-deities-and-asuras.name: Narasimha Slays Hiranyakashipu
lesser-deities-and-asuras.description: UAT gate: pillar test passes, demon-king neutralised.

lesser-deities-and-asuras.name: Devasena Restored
lesser-deities-and-asuras.description: Go-Live: Kartikeya's host returns to Svargaloka.

lesser-deities-and-asuras.name: Yama's Final Reckoning
lesser-deities-and-asuras.description: Final invoice: the lord of dharma balances the books.

Brahma.notes: Closing of a Brahma-day — the universe rests between cycles.

Shiva.notes: Tapasya at Mount Kailash — silence and ash.

Saraswati.notes: Vasant Panchami observance — restringing the veena.

Arjuna.notes: Tapasya for divine astras — solo mountain retreat.

Bhima.notes: Mace practice and a feast — Hidimba family visit.

Draupadi.notes: Day of fasting for the brothers' victory.

Ganesha.notes: Ganesh Chaturthi — modaks and quiet writing.

Kartikeya.notes: Skanda Sashti at Tiruchendur — peacock parade.
